academic_defense.summary: Thesis defense, academic presentations, research progress reports, grant applications.

ai_ops.summary: Telecom AI operations architecture, IT system overviews, digital transformation proposals, smart infrastructure reports.

government_blue.summary: Key project briefings, Five-Year Plan presentations, work summaries, investment promotion, policy interpretation.

government_red.summary: Government briefings, policy interpretation, work summaries, project introductions, investment promotion.

medical_university.summary: Medical academic reports, case discussions, research presentations, hospital work reports, medical education and training.

pixel_retro.summary: Tech talks, programming tutorials, game introductions, geek-style showcases.

psychology_attachment.summary: Psychotherapy training, academic lectures, counseling case analysis, professional sharing.

magazine-style-a.summary: Editorial-style decks with hero covers, big-number data pages, left-text-right-image layouts, image grids, pipeline/process slides, hero questions, big quotes, before/after comparisons, and lead-image side-text pages. Internalized from the local editorial HTML patterns and adapted for PPT SVG.

01_cover.summary: Hero cover: kicker + h-hero title + h-sub subtitle + lead paragraph + meta row. Vertical center, dark background.

02_chapter.summary: Act divider: kicker + single-word h-hero title + one-line lead. Alternates hero light/dark with Layout 1.

03a_data_hero.summary: 3x2 or 4x2 stat-card grid: label → big number → note. White background for number readability.

03b_content_abstract.summary: Abstract content page with title and bullet points, no special visualization.

03c_content_image_text.summary: Left text + right image (16:10 or 4:3). Grid 7:5 ratio. Text column uses flex with callout pinned to bottom.

04_quote_image.summary: Left column: kicker + large headline + lead + callout with source. Right column: image in standard ratio.

05_image_grid.summary: 3x2 or 2x3 image grid with captions. Fixed heights per cell, object-fit: cover.

06_pipeline.summary: Two-column pipeline: text pipeline + video/media pipeline. Steps with nb → title → desc structure.

07_suspense.summary: Hero question/suspense page: single large question in 3-line format. Max whitespace.

08_big_quote.summary: Big serif quote + attribution. Dark background for ceremony. Serif font for quote text.

09_comparison.summary: Before/After two-column comparison. Left dimmed (opacity .55), right full brightness. Border-left accent on each.

10_lead_image_side_text.summary: Large body text left (8:4 grid) + portrait image right (3:4). For pages with high text volume.

swiss-international.summary: PPTX-specific Swiss International SVG family with strict grids, hairline rules, high-contrast typography, and minimal decoration. The Sxx basenames are separate from the HTML data-layout registry.

S01_index_cover.summary: Swiss cover: large grid-aligned title, kicker above, metadata row below, hairline rule separator. Pure typographic.

S02_vertical_timeline.summary: Vertical timeline with numbered milestones connected by hairline rule. Left number column, right description.

S03_split_statement.summary: Split page: left half typographic statement (large type, tight tracking), right half whitespace or subtle image.

S04_asymmetric_grid.summary: Asymmetric grid layout: 2:3 or 3:2 ratio. Left column kicker + title, right column body text in Swiss grid.

S05_data_table.summary: Raw data table with Swiss styling: hairline borders, tabular nums, left-aligned text, right-aligned numbers.

S06_quadrant.summary: 2x2 quadrant with hairline rule cross. Each quadrant: number + title + brief description.

S07_fullbleed_image.summary: Full-bleed photograph with typographic overlay. White text on dark area or black text on light area. Hairline caption.

S08_three_column.summary: Three equal columns separated by hairline rules. Each: icon/number + title + 2-3 line description.

S09_step_process.summary: Horizontal step process: numbered circles connected by arrow rule. Max 5 steps per row.

S10_mixed_ratio.summary: Mixed ratio grid: 2:1 + 1:1 image-to-text blocks. Asymmetric but balanced.

S11_chapter_divider.summary: Swiss chapter divider: dark background, white number (large), chapter title below hairline rule.

S12_infographic.summary: Infographic page: data visualization with Swiss grid. Charts built from pure SVG rects/lines.

S13_callout.summary: Single callout block: large left-border accent, quote text, attribution. Minimal surrounding content.

S14_comparison_bar.summary: Horizontal bar comparison: labels left, bars right. Accent color for primary, gray for secondary.

S15_masonry.summary: Masonry grid: 2 columns of varying-height content blocks. Each block: image + caption.

S16_metric_card.summary: Metric cards in grid: number (tabular nums) + label + trend indicator. 2x2 or 3x2.

S17_quote_dark.summary: Dark hero quote: white serif text, centered, hairline above and below. One attribution line.

S18_team_roster.summary: Team roster: photo (square crop) + name + role + 1-line bio. Grid 2x2 or 3x2.

S19_agenda.summary: Agenda/timeline: time label + title + description. Connected by vertical hairline rule.

S20_framed_photo.summary: Single photograph in Swiss frame: generous padding, hairline border, caption below rule.

S21_end_slide.summary: Swiss ending: large thank you / contact info / QR code area. Typographic, no decoration.

S22_reference.summary: Reference/sources page: numbered list, small type, hairline separator from main content.
